show_tier_grid.description: When true, renders iso-value diagonal tier grid lines

show_x_mean_line.description: When true, renders the mean reference line on the X axis

show_y_mean_line.description: When true, renders the mean reference line on the Y axis

point_color_mode.description: Color mode for scatter plot points; absence means default marker color

axis.description: Axis the reference line is drawn on

value.description: Position of the reference line along the axis (must be finite)

label.description: Display label for the reference line

color.description: Hex color string for the reference line

reference_lines.description: Custom reference lines to render on the chart axes

custom_title.description: Custom chart title; null means use auto-generated title

custom_subtitle.description: Custom chart subtitle; null means use auto-generated subtitle

font_family.description: Font family for chart text; null means Highcharts default
